zh.lifeSummary: 當Alan Dapifer FitzFlaad於1078年出生在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉多爾-德-布利塔尼時，他的父親Flaald fitz Flaald Seneschal de Dol-de-Bretagne32歲，母親Guenta verch Gruffydd28歲。他於1105年之前與Avelina de Hesdin在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1101年被列為sheriff of shropshire。他去世於1126年11月11日在英國史洛普爾奧斯維斯崔享年48歲，埋葬在英國史洛普爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alan Dapifer FitzFlaad于1078年出生在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉多爾-德-布利塔尼时，他的父亲Flaald fitz Flaald Seneschal de Dol-de-Bretagne32岁，母亲Guenta verch Gruffydd28岁。他于1105年之前与Avelina de Hesdin在英国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1101年被列为sheriff of shropshire。他去世于1126年11月11日在英国史洛普爾奧斯維斯崔享年48岁，埋葬在英国史洛普爾。

nameMeanings.name: Alan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Alan Dapifer FitzFlaad was born in 1078, in Dol-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, his father, Flaald fitz Flaald Seneschal de Dol-de-Bretagne, was 32 and his mother, Guenta verch Gruffydd, was 28. He married Avelina de Hesdin before 1105, in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. In 1101, at the age of 23, his occupation is listed as sheriff of shropshire. He died on 11 November 1126, in Oswestry, Shropshire, England, at the age of 48, and was buried in Shropshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alan Dapifer FitzFlaad est né en 1078, à Dol-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, son père, Flaald fitz Flaald Seneschal de Dol-de-Bretagne, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Guenta verch Gruffydd, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Avelina de Hesdin avant 1105, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. En 1101, à l’âge de 23 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of shropshire. Il est décédé le 11 novembre 1126, à Oswestry, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Shropshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alan Dapifer FitzFlaad 1078 in Dol-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Flaald fitz Flaald Seneschal de Dol-de-Bretagne 32 und seine Mutter Guenta verch Gruffydd 28. Er hat vor 1105 in England Avelina de Hesdin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1101, als er 23 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of shropshire aufgeführt. Er starb am 11. November 1126 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Oswestry, Shropshire, England und wurde in Shropshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alan Dapifer FitzFlaad è nato il nel 1078 nel Dol-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Flaald fitz Flaald Seneschal de Dol-de-Bretagne, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Guenta verch Gruffydd, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Avelina de Hesdin prima del 1105, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1101, all'età di 23 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of shropshire. Morì il 11 novembre 1126, nel Oswestry, Shropshire, England, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Shropshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alan Dapifer FitzFlaadが1078年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインドル-デ-ブレタグンで生まれた時，父Flaald fitz Flaald Seneschal de Dol-de-Bretagneは32歳，母Guenta verch Gruffyddは28歳であった。1105年以前にイギリスでAvelina de Hesdinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1101年，23歳の時，職業はsheriff of shropshireと記録されている。彼は1126年11月11日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアオスウエストリーで48歳で死去し，イギリスシュロプシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alan Dapifer FitzFlaad(이)가 1078년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 도-데-브레타그니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Flaald fitz Flaald Seneschal de Dol-de-Bretagne(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Guenta verch Gruffydd(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1105년 이전 영국에서 Avelina de Hesdin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1101년, 23세의 나이로 그의 직업은 sheriff of shropshire이었다. 그는 1126년 11월 11일 영국 슈럽실르 오스베스트리에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 슈럽실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alan Dapifer FitzFlaad nasceu em 1078, em Dol-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Flaald fitz Flaald Seneschal de Dol-de-Bretagne, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Guenta verch Gruffydd, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Avelina de Hesdin antes 1105, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1101, com 23 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of shropshire. Ele faleceu em 11 de novembro de 1126, em Oswestry, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Shropshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alan Dapifer FitzFlaad родился в 1078 г. в местности дол-де-бретагн, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Flaald fitz Flaald Seneschal de Dol-de-Bretagne было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Guenta verch Gruffydd, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Avelina de Hesdin перед 1105 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. В 1101 году, в возрасте 23 лет,  он работал по профессии sheriff of shropshire. Он умер 11 ноября 1126 г. в местности освестри, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности шропшир, Англия.

sm.from 1101 to 1102: mai le 1101 e o'o I le 1102

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alan Dapifer FitzFlaad nació en 1078, en Dol-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Flaald fitz Flaald Seneschal de Dol-de-Bretagne, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Guenta verch Gruffydd, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Avelina de Hesdin antes de 1105, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. En 1101, a la edad de 23 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of shropshire. Murió el 11 de noviembre de 1126, en Oswestry, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Shropshire, Inglaterra.
